why: CHART: V-recovery off 7351 open lows, 6 green 5-min candles HH/HL, broke 7400 node (10:00 candle H7407 C7405.8), new recovery high 7407.8, above VWAP7385, momentum +. GEX CONFIRM: pika floor 7405 formed just under spot (real support), air pocket to next resistance 7440, broken barney = fuel in neg-gamma trending regime. Structure backs chart -> long.

CHART: up-thrust stalled ~7417, 10:15 candle red (tagged 7417.6, closed 7414.4), momentum fading 2nd read (+0.11->+0.05), ~20pts short of 7440 target. GEX: still above 7400 king/VWAP but no fresh floor, next node 7440 not being pressed. Cap the 0DTE winner (+0.09% underlying) rather than round-trip a fading thrust.

CHART: rolled from 7421 top, 3rd test of 7395 range-low BROKE (11:05 closed at lows 7385.9), lost VWAP7398 by ~11pts, lower lows, momentum neg. GEX CONFIRM: net gamma -53M deep-neg (trending/violent, levels extend), king migrated down to 7345, big 7400 barney (-21.5M) now overhead resistance caps bounces, ~45pts air to 7340/7345 pika-floor target. Structure backs chart -> short, target 7345, stop on VWAP/7400 reclaim.

CHART: strong flush 7387->7373 stalled ~7373 for 3 candles, 5-min momentum decelerating (-0.08->-0.05). GEX: large pika floor building below at 7300 (+15.6M, was 6.0M) = support forming, still above 7345 king. Cap the strong 0DTE winner (+0.19% underlying) on the stall rather than press last leg to 7345 and risk bounce to 7390 overhead barney.

CHART: midday bounce off 7372 died at resistance — tagged 7388 max, rejected to 7385.6, LOWER HIGH vs earlier, up-momentum flattened +0.12->+0.00 right at the level; day trend down. GEX CONFIRM: big 7390 barney king (-26.2M) + VWAP 7392.6 cap directly overhead, still neg-gamma, 7350 pika floor target below (~35pts). Tight invalidation on VWAP/7390 reclaim = ~5:1 R/R. Short toward 7350.

STOP HIT: price reclaimed VWAP 7392.5 (12:00 candle C7393.1), momentum flipped positive +0.10/+0.21 — my pre-defined invalidation. Rejection-short thesis broken; cut small (-0.10%) rather than hope. Do not fight a VWAP reclaim with positive momentum in neg-gamma.

CHART: HH/HL staircase off 11:40 midday low 7372 (7372->7382->7393->7397->7403), reclaimed VWAP at 12:00, 12:10 candle broke & held above 7400 (H7403.7 C7403.0), momentum building +0.11/+0.20. GEX CONFIRM: 7400 barney just broke (broken barney = fuel UP in deep neg-gamma -76M), air pocket to 7430 PIKA wall (+14.5M, ~27pts), floor 7350. Long, target 7420-7430, stop back below 7400/VWAP.

FAILED BREAKOUT: 7400 break did not hold — price faded to 7398.5 below the level, lower lows since 12:10 (7403.7->7402.7->7399.9->7398.5), 5-min momentum rolled negative -0.06%. Break-and-hold-7400 thesis invalidated. Cut at -0.06% before a possible VWAP loss + flush in deep neg-gamma. No round-tripping a dead breakout.

CHART: ~100min 7400 pin broke DOWN; decisive break below 7386 pin-low (14:05 closed 7384.4), lower lows, below VWAP7395, momentum negative both TFs & 5-min accelerating (-0.06->-0.08). Pattern matches my winning 11:05 flush, not the earlier whipsaws. GEX CONFIRM: 7390 barney now overhead resistance (-34.9M) caps bounce, 7365 pika floor target (~19pts, delta shrinking=support weakening), deep neg-gamma -60M favors flush. Short, target 7365, stop on 7390 reclaim.

THESIS NOT WORKING: post-break flush stalled — price mini-pinned 7385-7387 for ~5min, 15-min momentum flattened to -0.01% (bearish fuel gone, unlike the 11:05 flush that held neg momentum through its pause). Whippy zone that already cost 2 losses. Cut near breakeven (-0.02%) rather than hold to the 7390 stop, which has repeatedly been the losing outcome here today.
